headline: A Look At Lamb Weston (LW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Cost Savings Plan
summary: Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) has drawn investor interest after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 0.8% gain over the past day but declines across the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Lamb Weston Holdings. At a share price of $46.03, Lamb Weston’s recent 1-day share price gain contrasts with weaker 7-day, 30-day and 90-day share price returns. headline: Vertiv and EchoStar lead tech surge in S&P 500 rebalance
summary: Investing.com -- S&P Dow Jones Indices announced a sweeping overhaul of its benchmark tracking on Friday, propelling several technology and industrial firms into the prestigious S&P 500. Shares of Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE:VRT) surged 5.6% in after-hours trading following the news, while EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:LITE) also saw significant gains. The quarterly reshuffle is designed to maintain the integrity of the market’s most-watched gauges. S&P DJI st
